mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedback (answer_id, total_score, completeness, structure, expression, specificity, praise, interviewer_comment, improved_answer) VALUES (#{answerId}, #{totalScore}, #{completeness}, #{structure}, #{expression}, #{specificity}, #{praise}, #{interviewerComment}, #{improvedAnswer})
mapper.select: SELECT id, answer_id, total_score, completeness, structure, expression, specificity, praise, interviewer_comment, improved_answer, created_at FROM feedback WHERE answer_id = #{answerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
